text: Employees are entitled to 20 days of paid vacation per year. Vacation requests must be submitted at least 2 weeks in advance.
Remote work policy allows employees to work from home up to 3 days per week with manager approval.
Health insurance coverage begins on the first day of employment and covers medical, dental, and vision.
Professional development budget of $2000 per year is available for courses, certifications, and conferences.
Sick leave policy provides 10 days per year with no doctor's note required for absences under 3 consecutive days.
